message:
fix(tui): pass totalLength to applyDiff for reverse-frame alignment

SequenceGrid.tsx:
- Pass totalLength parameter to applyDiff() for correct reverse
  reading frame diff alignment
- Calculate totalLen from genomeLength if available, else sequence.length
- Fixes diff highlighting misalignment for reverse frames (-1, -2, -3)
  in the terminal UI

This aligns with the core/virtualizer.ts fix that added the
totalLength parameter for proper reverse-complement coordinate
mapping in chunked diff computation.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
